ORDER GRANTING TERMS OF STIPULATION, CONSOLIDATING HEARING DATES

LAW AND MOTION 302, PER ORDER OF THE PRESIDING JUDGE, PETITIONER UNITED EDUCATORS OF SAN FRANCISCO AFT/CFT'S RE-NOTICED HEARING ON SECOND AMENDED PETITION FOR WRIT OF ADMINSTRATIVE MANDAMUS IS TO BE HEARD IN HALL OF JUSTICE, DEPARTMENT 18 BEFORE JUDGE ULMER. THE PARTIES ARE TO MEET AND CONFER AND CONTACT THE CLERK AT (415) 551-0318 TO SET THE HEARING DATE. THE COURT WILL NOT PROVIDE A COURT REPORTER FOR THIS HEARING. IF ANY PARTY WISHES A REPORTER, THE PARTIES MUST MEET AND CONFER AND AGREE ON A SINGLE REPORTER. PETITIONERS MUST DELIVER COURTESY COPIES OF THE SECOND AMENDED PETITION TO DEPARTMENT 302, WITH A COVER LETTER NOTING THE TRANSFER TO DEPARTMENT 18, NO LATER THAN MARCH 24, 2014 AT 4:00 PM PER LOCAL RULE 2.6C OR THE PETITION MAY BE DENIED OR TAKEN OFF CALENDAR. ANY EXHIBIT MUST BE SEPARATED BY AN EXHIBIT TAB PER CRC 3.1110(F). THE COURT HAS COURTESY COPIES OF THE MOVING, OPPOSITION AND REPLY PAPERS. JUDGE: RICHARD A. KRAMER; CLERK: GINA GONZALES; REPORTER: SHERRY SAWYER CSR# 5976. (302)

OPPOSITION TO MTN FOR DECLATORY RELIEF FILED BY RESPONDENT CALIFORNIA UNEMPLOYMENT INSURANCE APPEALS BOARD

LAW AND MOTION 302, PER ORDER OF THE PRESIDING JUDGE, REAL PARTY IN INTEREST SAN FRANCISCO UNIFIED SCHOOL DISTRICT'S MOTION FOR DECLARATORY JUDGMENT ON FIRST AMENDED CROSS-COMPLAINT IS TO BE HEARD IN HALL OF JUSTICE, DEPARTMENT 18 BEFORE JUDGE ULMER. THE PARTIES ARE TO MEET AND CONFER AND CONTACT THE CLERK AT (415) 551-0318 TO SET THE HEARING DATE. THE COURT WILL NOT PROVIDE A COURT REPORTER FOR THIS HEARING. IF ANY PARTY WISHES A REPORTER, THE PARTIES MUST MEET AND CONFER AND AGREE ON A SINGLE REPORTER. CROSS-COMPLAINANT SAN FRANCISCO UNIFIED SCHOOL DISTRICT MUST DELIVER COURTESY COPIES OF THE FIRST AMENDED CROSS-COMPLAINT, MOVING AND REPLY PAPERS TO DEPARTMENT 302, WITH A COVER LETTER NOTING THE TRANSFER TO DEPARTMENT 18, NO LATER THAN MARCH 24, 2014 AT 4:00 PM PER LOCAL RULE 2.6B AND 2.6C OR THE MOTION MAY BE DENIED OR TAKEN OFF CALENDAR. ANY EXHIBIT MUST BE SEPARATED BY AN EXHIBIT TAB PER CRC 3.1110(F). THE COURT HAS COURTESY COPIES OF THE OPPOSITION PAPERS. JUDGE: RICHARD A. KRAMER; CLERK: GINA GONZALES; REPORTER: SHERRY SAWYER CSR# 5976. (302)

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Declaratory Judgment On First Amended X-Complaint
Off Calendar Mar-24-2014 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance. The Court adopted its tentative ruling. Per order of the Presiding Judge, REAL PARTY IN INTEREST SAN FRANCISCO UNIFIED SCHOOL DISTRICT'S Motion For Declaratory Judgment On First Amended Cross-Complaint is to be heard in Hall of Justice, Department 18 before Judge Ulmer. The parties are to meet and confer and contact the clerk at (415) 551-0318 to set the hearing date. The court will not provide a court reporter for this hearing. If any party wishes a reporter, the parties must meet and confer and agree on a single reporter. Cross-Complainant San Francisco Unified School District must deliver courtesy copies of the First Amended Cross-Complaint, moving and reply papers to Department 302, with a cover letter noting the transfer to Department 18, no later than March 24, 2014 at 4:00 pm per Local Rule 2.6B and 2.6C or the motion may be denied or taken off calendar. Any exhibit must be separated by an exhibit tab per CRC 3.1110(f). The court has courtesy copies of the opposition papers. Judge: Richard A. Kramer; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Reporter: Sherry Sawyer CSR# 5976.

Re-Notice Of Hearing On Second Amended Petititon For Writ Of Adminstrative Mandamus
Off Calendar Mar-24-2014 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance. The Court adopted its tentative ruling. Per order of the Presiding Judge, PETITIONER UNITED EDUCATORS OF SAN FRANCISCO AFT/CFT'S Re-Noticed Hearing On Second Amended Petition For Writ Of Adminstrative Mandamus is to be heard in Hall of Justice, Department 18 before Judge Ulmer. The parties are to meet and confer and contact the clerk at (415) 551-0318 to set the hearing date. The court will not provide a court reporter for this hearing. If any party wishes a reporter, the parties must meet and confer and agree on a single reporter. Petitioners must deliver courtesy copies of the Second Amended Petition to Department 302, with a cover letter noting the transfer to Department 18, no later than March 24, 2014 at 4:00 pm per Local Rule 2.6C or the petition may be denied or taken off calendar. Any exhibit must be separated by an exhibit tab per CRC 3.1110(f). The court has courtesy copies of the moving, opposition and reply papers. Judge: Richard A. Kramer; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Reporter: Sherry Sawyer CSR# 5976.
